description: Generate TLA+ from the blueprint and model-check with TLC (layer 2: EMPIRICAL certificate)
rules: read-only on the target — writes only the structured report into RECORD_STORE
fail-closed: a missing prover binary is status=fail (missing_tool), never a silent skip or pass
deterministic structured JSON out — the report IS the certificate the ledger records
usage: Set TARGET_BLUEPRINT; optional TLC_TIMEOUT (default 120s). Output: backbone_tlc.json {status,detail,error}.
limitation: Bounded model check of the state skeleton with values abstracted (computes frame-preserving, context inits NULL): proves gate NULL-safety + transition well-formedness, not data-level invariants.
